name: Mindee
description: Mindee document AI / OCR platform. Extract structured fields from invoices, receipts, IDs, passports, driver licenses, resumes, and other document types using pre-built parsers. Returns labeled field-value JSON, not raw text.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Mindee API key from https://platform.mindee.com (Settings > API Keys).

tools.name: parse_invoice
tools.description: Extract structured fields from an invoice using the Mindee Invoices v4 parser. Returns supplier name/address/VAT, customer info, invoice number, dates, line items, totals (with tax breakdown), currency, and payment details. Send the document as a publicly accessible URL.

document.description: Publicly accessible URL of the invoice (PDF, JPEG, PNG, TIFF, or HEIC). Max 10 MB and 100 pages.

tools.name: parse_receipt
tools.description: Extract structured fields from an expense receipt using the Mindee Expense Receipts v5 parser. Returns merchant, date, time, total amount + tax + tip, currency, category, line items, and payment method.

document.description: Publicly accessible URL of the receipt image (PDF, JPEG, PNG, TIFF, or HEIC).

tools.name: parse_financial_document
tools.description: Auto-detect whether a document is an invoice or a receipt and parse it with the right model. Returns a unified financial-document schema (supplier, customer, dates, totals, line items, taxes). Use this when the document type isn't known up front.

document.description: Publicly accessible URL of the document.

tools.name: parse_passport
tools.description: Extract fields from a passport using Mindee Passport v1. Returns surname, given names, country, ID number, MRZ lines, gender, date of birth, place of birth, issuance and expiry dates.

document.description: Publicly accessible URL of the passport image.

tools.name: parse_us_driver_license
tools.description: Extract fields from a US driver license using Mindee US Driver License v1. Returns license number, name, address, date of birth, issue and expiry dates, sex, height, weight, eye color, and class.

document.description: Publicly accessible URL of the driver-license image.

tools.name: parse_international_id
tools.description: Extract fields from a non-US national ID card or residence permit using Mindee International ID v2. Returns document type, country, ID number, full name, date of birth, sex, address, and MRZ lines.

document.description: Publicly accessible URL of the ID document image.

tools.name: parse_resume
tools.description: Extract structured fields from a resume / CV using Mindee Resume v1. Returns candidate name and contact info, hard skills, soft skills, languages, education entries, and professional experience entries.

document.description: Publicly accessible URL of the resume (PDF or image).

tools.name: parse_bank_check
tools.description: Extract fields from a US/EU bank check using Mindee Bank Check v1. Returns payee, amount, date, check number, routing number, and account number.

document.description: Publicly accessible URL of the check image.

tools.name: predict_async
tools.description: Submit a document to any Mindee parser asynchronously. Use for large documents (>5 MB or 10+ pages) or when you want to avoid blocking on parse time. Returns a job with an ID; poll get_async_result with that ID until status is 'completed'. Pass the same product/version path you'd use synchronously.

account.description: Account that owns the product. Use 'mindee' for built-in parsers, or your own account name for custom-built APIs.

product.description: Product slug (e.g. 'invoices', 'expense_receipts', 'financial_document', 'passport', 'resume', or your custom API name).

version.description: Product version (e.g. '4' for invoices, '5' for expense_receipts, '1' for resume).

document.description: Publicly accessible URL of the document.

tools.name: get_async_result
tools.description: Poll the status of an async parse job. While the job is in progress, returns status='processing' or 'waiting'. When complete, the response includes the parsed document. Call repeatedly (with small backoff) until status is 'completed' or 'failed'.

product.description: Product slug used in the original predict_async call.

version.description: Product version used in the original predict_async call.

job_id.description: Job ID returned by predict_async (response.api_request.url contains it, also at job.id).
